answers: Wildlife includes all wild animals and plants. Earth has estimated 8.7 million species, but many are unidentified.
Endangered species: tigers (~4,500 left), snow leopards (~7,000), pangolins (most trafficked), and blue whales (~25,000).
Conservation success stories: bald eagle (recovered), giant panda (downlisted), humpback whale (population increasing).
Bonyoprani rokkha: habitat destroy na koro, illegal trade report koro, conservation organization e donate koro.
